sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n30622" key="e)gxronismo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐγχρον-ισμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n30622.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">prolonged use</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:46" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.46</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:9:23:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.23.10</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
